{'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'CreateStandardReceiver', 'description': 'Creates a StandardReceiver with Name, Email, JobTitle, OtherInfo, Phone/PhoneCode (resolved via ToPhoneNumberValue by countryId). If AvailableToAllProfilesOfCustomer=true: adds receiver to ALL customer profiles automatically.', 'trigger': 'Admin creates a new standard receiver in UI', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/StandardReceiverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'CreateStandardReceiverGroup', 'description': 'Creates a StandardReceiverGroup with name, customerId, isActiveForSubscription, availableForAllProfiles. Also supports SCIM group creation via CreateScimGroup (keyed by name+customerId). SCIM lookup via GetScimGroupByName.', 'trigger': 'Admin creates group or SCIM provisioning', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/IStandardReceiverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'GroupSubscriptionManagement', 'description': "GetGroupsForSubscription: returns groups with 'is subscribed' flag per std receiver. Filters by groupIds if provided (subscription module restricted to specific groups). UpdateGroupsForSubscription: batch update of multiple group access states (bool) via Tuple<groupId, bool> list.", 'trigger': 'Subscription module UI / self-service portal', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/IStandardReceiverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'InboundSmsDistribution', 'description': "When an InboundMessageEvent fires: looks up StandardReceiverGroupDistributionPhoneNumber by receiver phone code+number. If found and has profileId + groupId: gets standard receivers for group, sends broadcast to each receiver with OverruleBlocked=true via SendFastMessageSingleGroupAsync. CodeOrigin='StandardReceiverGroupDistribution'.", 'trigger': 'MO SMS to a distribution number', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/EventListeners/InboundMessageEventListener.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'AssignReceiverToGroupsAndProfiles', 'description': 'AddStandardReceiverToGroupsAsync: add receiver to multiple groups. AddStandardReceiversToGroupAsync: add multiple receivers to one group. Parallel operations for profiles (AddStandardReceiverToProfilesAsync, AddStandardReceiversToProfileAsync). All return string error message (null on success).', 'trigger': 'Admin manages group/profile memberships', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/IStandardReceiverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'DeleteStandardReceivers', 'description': 'DeleteStandardReceiver: deletes single receiver. DeleteGroup(groupId, customerId, deleteMembers): optionally deletes group members not in any other group. DeleteStandardReceiversAsync: bulk delete ALL receivers for customer + all profile/group mappings.', 'trigger': 'Admin deletes receiver or group, or customer offboarding', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/StandardReceiverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_7', 'name': 'DataImportAndExport', 'description': 'GetStandardReceiversForDownloadAsync: returns CSV-ready StandardReceiverRecord collection by customerId+countryId. FTP import via IStandardReceiverFtpImporter. DataImport pipeline via StandardReceiverDataImportPostProcessor.', 'trigger': 'CSV download or scheduled FTP import', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/IStandardReceiverService.cs'}
